name: the-pleasure-of-finding-things-out
description: Richard P. Feynman's The Pleasure of Finding Things Out — an executable toolkit exploring the joy of scientific discovery, the value of doubt, the nature of physics, and Feynman's unique approach to understanding the world through curiosity and evidence
useCase: Helps anyone cultivate scientific thinking and curiosity — from understanding how to doubt productively to appreciating the wonder of physics and learning Feynman's approach to problem-solving.
knownRisks: The book is a collection of writings — topics vary widely across chapters
